name: Shroud of the Crucified
oracleText:
Equipped creature gets +0/+2 and has "When this creature dies, draw a card."
Equip {2}
flavorText: "Then took they the body of Jesus, and wound it in linen clothes." — John 19:40
notes: Created from a checked Messianic Fulfillment card list item; first-pass mana, colors, and mechanics were added, but final tuning remains pending. Source boundary is anchored to Luke with Matthew, Mark, and John as support material per the Biblical-series timeline guide. Classics theme art uses Albrecht Durer's "Entombment of Christ" via Wikimedia Commons.

classics.license: Public domain; Wikimedia Commons hosts a faithful reproduction of a public-domain work.
classics.sourceNotes: An entombment scene gives the shroud card a strong and sober burial context.
